name: ANC_CALENDAR_VL
query: SELECT B.CALENDAR_ID CALENDAR_ID, T.NAME NAME, T.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.START_DATE START_DATE, B.END_DATE END_DATE, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM ANC_CALENDAR_B B, ANC_CALENDAR_TL T WHERE B.CALENDAR_ID = T.CALENDAR_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
